title: Vanilla Adventures
description: The main goal of the modpack is to make a beautiful, interesting and most importantly balanced world, while not going beyond the minecraft style.
body:
# Why is this modpack worth downloading?
If you think that there is not enough variety and detail of buildings in minecraft, you think that there are not enough adventures, but you do not want to turn minecraft into a multicolored porridge and violate the vanilla style of the game, then this modpack is for you, because it adds more than ten new bosses, changes the usual small dungeons to huge, with a lot of riddles, at the same time, almost without adding new blocks. Also, the modpack will improve the end generation, thanks to the most beautiful mod "Better End".



# This modpack includes mods such as:
1) End Remastered
2) Better End
3) Bosses of Mass Destruction
4) Terralith
5) and other mods for dungeons, for optimization, for the work of Fresh Animations, as well as several client and optimizing modifications.
